prompt_template.task: Extract AI definition from legislation text
instructions: Do read the provided legislation text, do not skip any sections.
Do identify if there is an explicit definition of artificial intelligence (AI), do not assume a definition exists.
Do extract the definition exactly as written if it exists, do not paraphrase or summarize.
Do return empty string if no definition is found, do not fabricate a definition.

output_format.definition_found: <true if AI definition exists, false otherwise>
output_format.definition: <exact text of the definition, or empty string if not found>
